results.rendered_html:
parirakṣaṇaṃ, -parirakṣā
1 Protection, preservation, guarding;  Ms. 5. 94 , 7. 
2
2 Keeping, maintaining, adhering to; na samayaparirakṣaṇaṃ kṣamaṃ te  Ki. 1. 45. 
3 Deliverance, rescuing.
4 Care, caution.
